title: ternatea heterophylla
intro: Ternatea heterophylla, also known as the Vietnamese corals, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ternatea heterophylla include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb in treating various health conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
